subcodes.first_line: Your letter reached the Most Great Being, and the servant in attendance, on behalf of the Countenance, responds to what you have asked about the divine verses
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت بمنظر اکبر وارد و آنچه از آیات الهیه سوال نموده بودید عبد حاضر لدی
subcodes.subjects: @grammar and orthography, @grammatical and other discrepancies in the Sacred Writings, @law of inheritance, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @suffering and imprisonment
